chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 814 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.845/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 846/2023. 26.01.2026 This reference is pending since 2023 without any progress, even notice has not been issued. Be that as it may, the applicant remains unrepresented and it appears that the applicant is not interested in pursuing this matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported in PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge M. Khan
